headline: D Benefits From Investment in Infrastructure & Clean Energy Focus
summary: Dominion Energy gains from infrastructure investment, data center demand and clean energy expansion, but project risks and nuclear outages remain key concerns.

headline: Ameren (AEE) Valuation Check After Strong Q4 2025 Earnings And New Debt Offerings
summary: Ameren (AEE) is back on investors’ radar after reporting strong Q4 2025 results and solid full year earnings growth, alongside fresh senior notes and mortgage bond offerings that highlight its current funding options. See our latest analysis for Ameren. Ameren’s recent 9 day winning streak, with a cumulative 5.3% share price gain and a market cap increase of about $1.5b, sits alongside a 90 day share price return of 12.13% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 19.96%. Together, these point...
